creator: koma2@lovepeers.org
text:
I tested this with the following conditions:

* Only install portupgrade and its dependents.
* Run "portupgrade -N bash"

The followings are logs of this test:

  Before applying patch:

http://bloghome.lovepeers.org/daymemo2/files/2008/0106/bash-without_portupgrade_patch.log

  After applying patch:

http://bloghome.lovepeers.org/daymemo2/files/2008/0106/bash-with_portupgrade_patch.log
